title: trichanthera corymbosa
intro: Trichanthera corymbosa, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Blue Tea plant, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trichanthera corymbosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health due to its high content of anthocyanins and other flavonoids. Trichanthera corymbosa can be consumed as a herbal tea, supplement, or used as an ingredient in skincare products.
